name: Rockridge Resources Ltd.
description: Trident Resources Corp. (TSX-V: ROCK) is a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on advancing district-scale gold and copper opportunities within the prolific La Ronge Gold Belt of northern Saskatchewan. The company has assembled a large, strategic land position covering approximately 160,300 hectares, targeting areas with past-producing mines and known deposits. Through systematic exploration and active drilling programs, such as at its flagship Contact Lake Gold Project, Trident aims to expand known mineralization and unlock the broader potential of the region, supported by an experienced technical team and strong financial backing.
